issues: placement near dark-red tile boundary slightly reduces local contrast
reasoning: The potion_speed_v02 asset uses a warm orange/amber liquid in a light-colored bottle with cork — its warm hue pops immediately against the cool dark-teal background tiles, meeting the 0.5s spottability bar. Pixel-art style matches the rest of the scene; the bottle silhouette is distinct from enemies, the EchoBox creature, and UI buttons. No hue clash with the background. Visibility dips slightly where the sprite overlaps the dark-red tile area, but the bright orange body still reads clearly. Overall the asset is well-integrated, uncluttered, and fits the Echoes aesthetic.
